LanguageData.ABY_SigilRepeater.label: sigil repeater
LanguageData.ABY_SigilRepeater.description: A compact infernal repeater built around a chained sigil chamber. It dumps six ritualized breach needles in a fast, bright burst, making it the first weapon in the forge that feels unmistakably Abyssal without jumping straight into late-game dominance.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilNeedleProjectile.label: sigil needle
